title: pilosella pilosellina
intro: Pilosella pilosellina, also known as Alpine Mouse-ear or Alpine Daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including digestive problems, fever, and respiratory ailments, due to its expectorant and antiseptic properties. Pilosella pilosellina can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to promote overall well-being and alleviate symptoms associated with various health conditions.
